name: Delta State (Nigeria)

colors.symbolism: agriculture and the natural resources of the Niger Delta
the courage of the people of Delta State
the rivers of the Niger Delta

description: Three horizontal stripes — green, white, and red — with the state coat of arms at the centre.
history: Delta State was created in 1991 when it was carved out of the former Bendel State. Its flag and coat of arms were adopted as part of the symbols of the new state government.

features.role: Coat of arms of Delta State
